app.name: cargo-public-api
app.one_liner: List and diff the public API of Rust library crates between releases and commits to detect breaking API changes and semver violations.

screens.name: CLI Output Display
screens.purpose: Show colored, line-by-line listing or diff of a crate's public API in the terminal.

rust_commands.name: diff_public_api
rust_commands.purpose: Compare the public API of a local crate against a published version or another commit.

rust_commands.name: list_public_api
rust_commands.purpose: Generate and display the public API of a Rust crate as one item per line.

mvp_plan: week 1: Integrate rustdoc JSON generation with nightly toolchain detection
week 1: Render deterministic public API output matching rustdoc HTML
week 1: Set up CLI parsing for list and diff commands
acceptance_tests: Rendering of public API items is deterministic and unaffected by rustdoc JSON ordering changes.
The tool includes default trait methods in impls even when not overridden, matching rustdoc HTML behavior.
The tool successfully detects breaking API changes between crate versions via CLI diff.
